text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the spring Tenno Sho, Oguri Cap and Tamamo
Cross get the chance to go head-to-head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now for the results.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Argh, I lost! Dammit!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama... Did I just beat you?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Get your head outta the clouds, wouldja? Ya
took first place!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...This time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'm takin' the crown!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... I lost.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You really are a great racer, Tama. You're just
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap seems frustrated yet genuinely happy
at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take it she's pleased to see how strong her friend
is—and to have such a friend as a rival.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not gonna be chasing after you next time.
You'll be the one running behind me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whew, talk about confidence! Do ya seriously
think ya can overtake me that easily?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna beat ya next time too!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Our battle for the top is only just beginnin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: See ya in the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Heh... Looks like it's decided. Later!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wait! Tama...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Does this mean you're not coming back to the
dorm until fall?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Why da hell would it mean that?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer. I need to enter the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to settle things with Tama once and for
all there. Is that okay by you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is still ahead of us, but Oguri
Cap has already found her next goal!
